profile.name: Rishu Gupta
profile.bio: Specializing in building resilient web architectures and secure cloud infrastructures. Dedicated to bridging the gap between high-performance code and uncompromising digital security. DedSec operative.

projects.title: SecureVault Node
projects.synopsis: End-to-end encrypted file storage system with decentralized access controls.
projects.description: Implemented a zero-knowledge architecture using AES-256-GCM for file encryption and RSA-4096 for secure key exchange between distributed nodes.

projects.title: PacketSleuth
projects.synopsis: Real-time network traffic analysis tool with visual HUD for intrusion detection.
projects.description: Developed a high-throughput engine for monitoring network packets and identifying anomalous behavior using machine learning heuristics.

projects.title: Aura Gateway
projects.synopsis: Highly scalable API gateway with automated rate-limiting and DDoS protection.
projects.description: Built a custom proxy layer handling 50k+ requests per minute with integrated Redis-based caching and intelligent traffic shaping.
